values.llm_stream:
Here’s the gist of AGENTS.md:

- Purpose: Essential info for working on the OpenHands-Tab VS Code extension and its Agent SDK.
- Prerequisites: Node.js 22 LTS (npm ≥ 10) and VS Code ≥ 1.104.
- Quick commands:
  - Install: npm ci
  - Build all (SDK + extension + webview): npm run build
  - Test: npm test (with example targeted Vitest command)
  - Lint: npm run lint
  - Type check: npm run typecheck
  - Dev watch: npm run watch
  - Launch extension: press F5 or run code "$(pwd)" --extensionDevelopmentPath="$(pwd)"
- Tooling setup: Ensure Node 22 and npm are on PATH (e.g., via nvm or tarball).
- Project structure overview:
  - src/: VS Code extension (entry, tests, connection/session/settings/sidebar/webview React UI)
  - packages/agent-sdk-ts/: TypeScript SDK (conversation API, context, runtime, LLM clients, tools, types)
  - tests/e2e/: End-to-end tests (truncated in view)
